message:
Add Vector Search tab to demo page

- Add Vector Search tab with search UI
- Add CSS styles for vector search components
- Add populateVectorColumns() to detect vector columns on file load
- Add runVectorSearch() for brute-force similarity search
- Show results with rank, row index, similarity score, and image
- Add example buttons for quick row selection

The vector search uses cosine similarity to find similar images
by embedding vectors, scanning all vectors via Range requests.
